name: EF Hutton Acquisition Corporation I Warrant
summary: EF Hutton Acquisition Corporation I Warrants are securities that give the holder the right to purchase shares of the company's common stock at a specific price within a certain timeframe. These warrants are often issued as part of a unit offering and provide investors with the potential to profit from future increases in the stock price. The terms and conditions of the warrants are detailed in the offering prospectus.
